_doc: Single source of truth for KiX landing-page deprecation. Updated when a page is marked for sunset. Lint reads this; cron mounts banner.

_schema.page: relative path from repo root (e.g. landing/index.html)
_schema.deprecated_at: ISO date — when the deprecation banner went live
_schema.sunset_at: ISO date — when the page is rewritten or 302'd to /brands/{successor}
_schema.successor: URL to redirect/migrate to once sunset
_schema.owner_email: who decides when to flip the switch

deprecations.reason: Hand-edited index drifts from landing_gen output; brands/default/ is the canonical render.
Pricing canon is now app/services/pricing_canon.py; pricing.html cannot stay in sync.
Chain page replaced by generated landing/brands/{chain-id}/ with ChainSection.
Founder explicitly killed 'enterprise' framing in favor of 'for chains'.
Trinity 3T is internal vocabulary; CLASS-D vocab_check would reject this page.
Process-page content moves into brands/default/ once landing_gen has a process section.
Case studies now sourced from generate_landing_sites.py SG_F_AND_B_CASES.
MY-specific cases will be sourced from BrandConfig once we add country axis.
Vertical benchmarks now rendered inline by landing_gen via vertical_benchmarks.py.
Game demo iframe path; needs consumer-audience landing template before deprecation.
Portal is logged-in app shell, not a landing page — exempt from deprecation. Kept here for clarity.
Storefront preview folded into per-brand pages.
Alpha cohort signup absorbed into Founding-100 flow on default page.
OAuth connect page is functional, not a landing — exempt.
Named-persona page subsumed by chain-scale brand landing.
Investor page is for a different audience (not merchants); keep separate, not in CLASS-A scope.
Generic demo page; landing_gen output is the new demo.
